caption: A bald man with a white beard and mustache, wearing a grey polo shirt with a small dark logo on the chest, speaks while standing in a professional exhibit setting. He is positioned in front of white display panels featuring various posters. To his left, a dark banner includes the text "roMaker3D" and "Collagton innovative". Behind him, a poster displays the heading "ZB38 AlphaSzenzo" and "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes," along with diagrams and small images. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and head position, gesturing with his right hand. In the first frame, he looks slightly to the side; by the second, he is speaking and gesturing with his hand raised. In the final frames, he looks directly toward the camera, continuing to talk and move his hand in a descriptive motion.
